# CodeKarma

> Production Intelligence for the AI Era

CodeKarma is a production intelligence platform that maps production behavior directly to code. We provide engineering teams with code-level visibility into how their software systems actually behave in production — based on 100% of traffic, not samples.

## What We Do

- **Production Intelligence**: We monitor 100% of production traffic with zero overhead and map runtime behavior directly to source code.
- **KarmaLens** (For Developers): IDE plugin (JetBrains, VS Code) that surfaces dead code, method frequency, performance hotspots, and execution paths directly in the editor.
- **KarmaDomain** (For Architects & Platform Teams): Live API-level dependency graphs across microservices, databases, and async systems with multi-hop tracing.
- **KarmaPulse** (For Engineering Leadership): Operational command center with API health dashboards, error drift tracking, deployment analysis, and AI-powered root cause analysis.
- **KarmaIQ** (For AI Agents): MCP server providing production context to AI coding agents (Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, Claude) for deterministic debugging and RCA.

## Key Capabilities

- Zero-touch instrumentation with no performance impact
- 100% request monitoring (not sampled)
- Code-level clarity: runtime behavior mapped to specific methods and APIs
- Multi-hop tracing across queues, threads, sync and async systems
- Deterministic analysis based on real production data
- AI-native architecture built for AI agents to consume

## Deployment Options

- SaaS (managed by CodeKarma)
- Enterprise / Bring Your Own Cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP)

## Security & Compliance

- SOC 2 Type 2 certified
- AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Immutable audit logging

## What We Do Not Do

- We are NOT a traditional APM or monitoring tool. We provide production intelligence mapped to code, not dashboards with aggregated metrics.
- We are NOT a code analysis or static analysis tool. Our insights come from real production traffic, not source code scanning.
- We are NOT a logging or log aggregation platform.
- We are NOT a payment processing company (despite "Karma" in the name, we are unrelated to payment services).
- We do NOT sample traffic. We monitor 100% of requests.
- We do NOT require code changes or manual instrumentation.

## Company

- Founded by Anantharam Vanchi Prakash (ex-Amazon) and Priyanka Nahata (ex-Flipkart)
- Backed by Prosus, Accel, Xeed Ventures, SenseAI Ventures, Stargazer Ventures
- Based in Bengaluru, India
- Website: https://codekarma.ai
- Contact: info@codekarma.ai
